docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $565.43 FILED BY KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MCKIBBEN, CAROL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-04-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
